lastSummary: Created today's daily note for 2026-04-11 and recorded that no new commits or fresh user-visible project work appeared in the prior hour; Git HEAD stayed at f20b80f.
Captured passive activity instead: mission-control keepalive/dev logs and rebuilt dist assets were touched around 10:48 AM EDT, and the managed worker wake refreshed its own state file.
Re-reviewed both long-lived Discord branch state files against the importance rubric, found no pending shared-important promotions, and stamped fresh review metadata before git auto-sync.
